prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021-2025年中山大学在甘肃物理类（含原理科）最低录取位次分别为约10223名、2092名、1731名、1578名、1925名。2021年因首次新高考改革过渡出现异常高 位次，2022年起位次大幅前移至2000名以内并趋于稳定，2025年略有后移至1925名，近三年波动区间约1578-1925名，整体处于高位竞争态势；中山大学在甘肃 物理类招生计划2021年33人、2022年31人、2023年31人、2024年31人、2025年29人，呈小幅缩减趋势。2026年招生计划大幅扩增至79人，较2025年增加50人，增幅约17 2%，为近年来最大规模扩招，将显著缓解竞争压力，拉低录取位次门槛。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 中山大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2026年第13名（20 25年第12名），稳居全国顶尖高校前列，综合实力强劲，对高分考生持续具有强吸引力；2026年高考周期内中山大学声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及学术不端舆情 及校园管理事件，抖音热度排名第29（较热），整体曝光度较高但负面舆情可能对部分考生报考意愿产生一定抑制。2025年声誉评价为偏正面，显示近年声誉波动较大；中山大学拥有生态学（A+）、工商管理（A+）、马克思主义理论（A）、中国语言文学（A）、数学（A）、物理学（A）、生物学（A）、药学（A）、公共卫生与预防医学 （A）、基础医学（A）、计算机科学与技术（A-）、临床医学（A-）等23个A-及以上学科，学科覆盖面广，医学、理学、管理学实力突出，与招生专业高度匹配。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 中山大学位于广东省广州市，距甘肃较远，属于跨省就读。该校在甘肃招生占比相对较小 ，但作为华南顶尖综合性大学，对西北考生仍具较强吸引力；计算机类、临床医学等热门专业持续高热。2026年甘肃省普通高考考生总数约218700人，较2025年（物理类121443+历史类58374≈179817）大幅增加约21.6%，全省竞争加 剧，部分抵消扩招带来的利好。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次1925名、2026年招生计划大幅扩招172%、全省考生总数增加约21.6%、声誉偏 负面等因素，扩招是主导因素，将显著拉低录取位次门槛，但考生增加和声誉波动部分抵消扩招效应。预测2026年物理类最低录取位次约3886名，区间3443-4329名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Sun Yat-sen University in Gansu Physics Category (including former Science Category) were approximately 10223, 2092, 1731, 1578, and 1925 respectively. In 2021, due to the transition to the new college entrance examination, there was an abnormally high ranking. From 2022 onwards, the ranking significantly moved forward to within 2000 and stabilized. In 2025, it slightly moved back to 1925. The fluctuation range in the past three years is about 1578-1925, indicating a high-level competitive situation overall. The enrollment plan for Sun Yat-sen University in Gansu Physics Category was 33 in 2021, 31 in 2022, 31 in 2023, 31 in 2024, and 29 in 2025, showing a slight decreasing trend. In 2026, the enrollment plan significantly expands to 79, an increase of 50 compared to 2025, an increase of about 172%, the largest expansion in recent years, which will significantly alleviate competitive pressure and lower the admission ranking threshold.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Sun Yat-sen University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Ranking, it ranks 13th (12th in 2025), firmly among the top universities in the country, with strong comprehensive strength, continuously attracting high-scoring students. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, Sun Yat-sen University's reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving academic misconduct incidents and campus management events. Its Douyin popularity ranks 29th (relatively hot), with overall high exposure, but negative public opinion may suppress some candidates' willingness to apply. In 2025, the reputation evaluation was somewhat positive, indicating significant fluctuations in reputation in recent years. Sun Yat-sen University has 23 A- and above disciplines, including Ecology (A+), Business Administration (A+), Marxist Theory (A), Chinese Language and Literature (A), Mathematics (A), Physics (A), Biology (A), Pharmacy (A), Public Health and Preventive Medicine (A), Basic Medicine (A), Computer Science and Technology (A-), Clinical Medicine (A-), etc. The discipline coverage is broad, with outstanding strengths in medicine, science, and management, highly matching the enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Sun Yat-sen University is located in Guangzhou, Guangdong Province, far from Gansu, requiring cross-province study. The proportion of enrollment in Gansu is relatively small, but as a top comprehensive university in South China, it still has strong appeal to candidates from the northwest. Popular majors such as Computer Science and Clinical Medicine continue to be highly sought after. In 2026, the total number of candidates for the Gansu Province regular college entrance examination is about 218,700, a significant increase of about 21.6% compared to 2025 (Physics Category 121,443 + History Category 58,374 ≈ 179,817), intensifying competition across the province, partially offsetting the benefits of the enrollment expansion.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 1925, the significant enrollment expansion of 172% in 2026, the increase in total candidates by about 21.6%, and the somewhat negative reputation, the enrollment expansion is the dominant factor, significantly lowering the admission ranking threshold. However, the increase in candidates and reputation fluctuations partially offset the expansion effect. It is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for the 2026 Physics Category will be about 3886, with a range of 3443-4329.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, the Physics Category sees a significant enrollment expansion, with a predicted ranking range of 3443-4329, notably lower than 2025. Candidates with rankings near the upper limit (4329) can focus on sprinting for Tier 2 majors and secure Tier 3 as a backup. Those near the lower limit (3443) can aim for Tier 1 Clinical Medicine and Computer Science, with Tier 2 as the main target. Candidates with rankings significantly better than 3443 can boldly sprint for Tier 1 flagship majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Sun Yat-sen University in Gansu History Category (including original Liberal Arts) were approximately 269, 244, 224, 231, and 221 respectively. Overall, there is a slow forward trend, with rankings stable in the 220-270 range over the past five years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 221, indicating a highly stable competitive landscape. The enrollment plan for Sun Yat-sen University in Gansu History Category was 10 in 2021, 12 in 2022, 12 in 2023, 12 in 2024, and 12 in 2025, remaining stable in recent years. In 2026, the enrollment plan expands to 18, an increase of 6 from 2025, a 50% increase, marking the first significant expansion in recent years, which will alleviate competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Sun Yat-sen University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks 13th, firmly among the top universities in the country, maintaining strong appeal for high-scoring liberal arts students. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, Sun Yat-sen University's reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving academic misconduct public opinion. Its Douyin popularity ranks 29th (relatively hot), with overall high exposure. Negative public opinion may somewhat suppress some candidates' willingness to apply, but as a traditional prestigious university, Sun Yat-sen University's brand effect remains strong. The university excels in humanities and social sciences, with advantageous disciplines such as Business Administration (A+), Chinese Language and Literature (A), Marxist Theory (A), Law (A-), Sociology (A-), Philosophy (A-), Foreign Languages and Literatures (A-), and Applied Economics (A-), highly matching the History Category admission majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Law and Economics are highly popular in society. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance examination candidates in Gansu Province is approximately 218,700, a significant increase from 2025, intensifying competition across the province. The number of History Category candidates in 2026 is missing; estimated at about 60,000-70,000 based on recent proportions, with overall competition levels stable. Sun Yat-sen University is located in Guangzhou, Guangdong Province, far from Gansu, requiring cross-province study. Although the university admits a small number of History Category students in Gansu, as a top comprehensive university in South China, it still holds strong appeal for liberal arts candidates from the northwest.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 221, the 2026 enrollment plan expansion of 50%, the increase in total provincial candidates, and the somewhat negative reputation, the expansion is the main influencing factor, which will moderately lower the admission ranking threshold. It is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for History Category in 2026 will be approximately 277, with a range of 227-327.
